text.title: 3Q Testimonial — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a `Testimonial` record produced from a 3-question reply.

list.item: `outcome_quote` — verbatim string from Q2 reply with a metric
`metric` — object `{value, unit, period}` extracted from Q2 (NULL if no metric)
`display_variants` — array of 3 `{length: enum {short, mid, full}, body}`
`follow_up_due` — ISO date 90 days out (renewal-prompt for case study)

antipattern.description: Any quote field contains tokens injected by the operator or LLM ("amazing", "transformative", "best in class") that are not present in the customer reply.
antipattern.reason: Violates r3 verbatim preservation and FTC endorsement law.

antipattern.description: `consent: granted` without an explicit consent token in the parsed reply.
antipattern.reason: Violates r4. Operator may not publish.

antipattern.description: `metric: null` AND `display_variants` published as conversion-page hero.
antipattern.reason: Violates r5. Metric-less testimonials are warmth content, not hero content.

antipattern.description: `anti_recommend_quote` empty or "n/a" because customer skipped Q3.
antipattern.reason: If Q3 missing, request follow-up. Do NOT fabricate Q3 from Q1 or Q2 material.
Privacy violation. Variant generation must respect anon preference.

list.item: Fix typos / autocorrect mistakes without changing word choice.
Anonymise company name to industry+size if customer requests ("a 25-person SaaS").
Compose 3 length variants (short ≤ 80 chars, mid ≤ 200, full ≤ 600).

text.reference: JSON Schema the record validates against.

list.item: Consent token present and parsed correctly.
Display variants respect length and anonymity prefs.
